headline: Diamondback Energy (FANG) Is Amongst The Oversold NASDAQ Stocks Amid Oil Price Dip
summary: Diamondback Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) is one of the 10 oversold NASDAQ stocks to invest in right now. On June 29, Morgan Stanley reduced the price target on Diamondback Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) from $229 to $216. Despite this downward adjustment, the price target yields more than 25% upside potential at the prevailing level. The firm also […]
